summary: Task 04 introduces three new View struct fields, a constant CollectProcPidStat=6, a new view map entry referencing an existing query template, and a one-line skip in filterViews(). No user input handling, no I/O paths, no auth/access control, no new dependencies. The SQL template referenced (query.PgStatActivityProcPidStat) was security-audited in Task 02. OWASP Top 10 coverage: no vectors introduced.

owaspCoverage.A01_BrokenAccessControl: n/a — no access control surfaces touched
owaspCoverage.A03_Injection: n/a — query template is a static const reference; no new template variables; QueryAgeThresh sanitization is owned by Task 02 audit
owaspCoverage.A04_InsecureDesign: pass — NotRecordable flag is opt-in (default false), preserves existing behavior; no privilege boundaries crossed
owaspCoverage.A05_SecurityMisconfiguration: pass — view map entry uses initialized map literals (Filters, ColsWidth) avoiding nil-deref panics

hardcodedSecrets: none — no credentials, keys, tokens, or connection strings in the diff
